tasks.dev: sh -c 'deno run -A npm:esbuild src/web/app.ts --bundle --platform=browser --format=esm --target=es2019 --sourcemap=external --outfile=public/assets/app.js --watch & deno run --watch --allow-net --allow-read=public,.env --allow-env src/server.ts'
tasks.start: deno task build:client && deno run --allow-net --allow-read=public,.env --allow-env src/server.ts
tasks.build: deno task build:client && deno compile --allow-net --allow-read=public,.env --allow-env --output bin/os-ubq-fi src/server.ts
tasks.start:daemon: sh -c 'PORT=${PORT:-8000}; if lsof -i :$PORT -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then PORT=${PORT_FALLBACK:-8001}; fi; mkdir -p logs && deno task build:client && nohup deno run --allow-net --allow-read=public,.env --allow-env src/server.ts > "logs/ui-$PORT.log" 2>&1 & echo $! > "logs/ui-$PORT.pid" && sleep 0.8 && curl -fsS "http://localhost:$PORT/api/health" >/dev/null && echo "UI: http://localhost:$PORT (PID $(cat logs/ui-$PORT.pid))"'
tasks.dev:daemon: sh -c 'PORT=${PORT:-8000}; if lsof -i :$PORT -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1; then PORT=${PORT_FALLBACK:-8001}; fi; mkdir -p logs && nohup env PORT=$PORT deno task dev > logs/dev.log 2>&1 & echo $! > logs/dev.pid && sleep 0.8 && echo "Dev watch: http://localhost:$PORT  PID $(cat logs/dev.pid). Logs: logs/dev.log" && curl -fsS "http://localhost:$PORT/api/health" >/dev/null || echo "(health check not ready yet)"'
tasks.stop:daemon: sh -c 'PORT=${PORT:-8000}; PID_FILE="logs/ui-$PORT.pid"; if [ ! -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then echo "No PID file $PID_FILE"; exit 0; fi; PID=$(cat "$PID_FILE"); if kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then kill "$PID" && echo "Stopped UI (PID $PID)"; else echo "Process $PID not running"; fi; rm -f "$PID_FILE"'
tasks.stop:dev: sh -c 'PID_FILE=logs/dev.pid; if [ ! -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then echo "No dev PID file"; exit 0; fi; PID=$(cat "$PID_FILE"); if kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null; then kill "$PID" && echo "Stopped dev (PID $PID)"; else echo "Dev process $PID not running"; fi; rm -f "$PID_FILE"'
